title: LEchest
description: A Double Ender Chest plugin added to your server for extra storage.
body:
## LEChest
A Double Ender Chest plugin added to your server for extra storage

____

### Features
 - 54-slot Double Ender Chest (vanilla 27 + 27 extra)
 - Items stored safely using an SQLite .db file
 - Automatic migration from vanilla Ender Chest on first use
 - Lightweight, optimized, and compatible with Paper/Purpur
 - Built with future upgrades and extensions in mind
____

⚠️ This plugin is still in development! Be aware of bugs and glitches when using this plugin. For more information, join my Discord Server.
___
